title: SAGE-X Platform Schema
description: Consolidated SAGE-X v1r0 platform schema. This file is the single authoritative schema bundle for core runtime artifacts, second-tier implementation artifacts, local-first implementation planning artifacts, ISL/Sage-X bridge preparation artifacts, and scoped human/autonomous execution policy artifacts. The archive schema files are retained as backup/source fragments.

plan_id.description: Unique identifier for the execution plan

version.description: Version of the execution plan schema

spec_version.description: Reference to the specification version used

plan_segments.description: Optional plan sections/subgraphs with scoped execution mode and autonomy policy.

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge unit

content.description: Normalized content of the knowledge unit

source_specification.description: Optional reference to the originating specification

source_element.description: Optional reference to the originating specification element

capability_ref.description: Reference to abstract capability used in this step

segment_id.description: Optional plan segment containing this step. Segment policy applies unless overridden at step level.

execution_id.description: Execution instance associated with the validation

executionMode.description: Execution mode for a plan, segment, or step. auto/autonomous and manual/guided are accepted aliases.

scope_ref.description: Plan, segment, or step identifier governed by this policy.
